scripts.build:wasm: cd routx-wasm && cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release --lib && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir ../src --no-typescript target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/routx_wasm.wasm
scripts.build:linux: cd routx-wasm && cargo build --release --bin pbf-to-routx --features bin && mkdir -p ../src/bin && cp target/release/pbf-to-routx ../src/bin/
